subject: refactor(projects): remove Google Favicon API fallback
body:
Simplifies the ProjectImage fallback chain to screenshot → initials
placeholder only. Removes the Google Favicon API middle step to avoid
an external dependency and privacy concern.

Tags: projects, screenshots, refactor
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: project-screenshots
Semver: patch
title: remove Google Favicon API fallback
